title: Skinlayer Toggle
description: Toggle your Minecraft skin layers using customizable hotkeys.
body:
# **Skinlayer toggle**

Toggle your Minecraft skin layers using customizable hotkeys.
Each hotkey can control one or multiple individual skin layer parts.

All hotkeys are fully configurable in the mod’s own settings UI.

![Keybind settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61502d3e250a1ebd9402b834fd755ff1452f4ee0_0.webp)

![Toggle on](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86c993da5d83f0a7f5fd536b52291b7e827fa474.png)

![Toggle off](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d37692d5e53f82a3813b2a2770708cfaac34643.png)
